---
title: "A new home on the web"
date: 2026-07-09
categories: [news]
description: "Relaunching jorisberns.com as a Quarto site."
---

Welcome to the relaunched version of this site, now built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and deployed automatically via GitHub Actions. The previous version served me well through the PhD years, but a research program built on computational text and audio analysis deserves a website that is itself reproducible: every page is plain text under version control, and publications, talks, and resources live in simple data files.

Expect occasional posts here on research methods — computational text analysis, paraverbal measurement, working with the Snellius supercomputer — alongside announcements of new papers and code releases.
